sql_array: CREATE TABLE punycode_test (id UInt32, encoded_string String, value Tuple(String, Int32));
SELECT punycodeDecode(encoded_string) AS decoded, value.1, value.2 FROM punycode_test WHERE value.2 > (SELECT AVG(value.2) FROM punycode_test) HAVING decoded != '' ORDER BY value.2;

SELECT id, punycodeDecode(encoded_string) AS decoded_value FROM punycode_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM punycode_test WHERE value.2 IS NULL) OR decoded_value = punycodeDecode('Mnchen-3ya') ORDER BY decoded_value;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, punycodeDecode(encoded_string) AS decoded_value FROM punycode_test GROUP BY decoded_value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT punycodeDecode(encoded_string.a.N) AS decoded FROM (SELECT encoded_string, [1, 2] AS a) GROUP BY decoded;

SELECT decoded FROM (SELECT punycodeDecode(encoded_string) AS decoded, value.1 FROM punycode_test UNION ALL SELECT punycodeDecode('xn--nchen-3ya') AS decoded, 'Test' FROM system.numbers LIMIT 5) AS combined WHERE decoded != '' ORDER BY decoded;
SELECT id, IF(punycodeDecode(encoded_string) IS NULL, 'NULL decoded', punycodeDecode(encoded_string)) AS decoded_output FROM punycode_test WHERE decoded_output = '';
SELECT punycodeDecode(CONCAT(encoded_string, ' test')) AS combined_decoded FROM punycode_test WHERE encoded_string != '';
